race.comment: NEXT EXIT (11) was well in commission last time out but didn't live up to market expectations, finishing sixth over 1200m at Sunshine Coast. Ready to peak now third-up from the spell and where there's smoke there's fire. Well placed on this occasion and gets her chance to break the ice. SCION (4) went back early from his wide draw over 1000m at Dalby last time but found the line strongly to finish fifth. One of the main contenders despite the sticky draw. EXPRESS STAR (2) will be better with that first-up effort in the locker and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. In the mix. BOMBUS (1) is improving with racing and looks a must for the multiples.
